doc_id.description: Primary key. Stable document slug or identifier across re-extractions of the same source.

source_path.description: Absolute path or HTTPS URL of the source document.

source_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the source file.

extracted_facts.description: Array of fact objects extracted from the document.

entities.description: Named entities identified in the document.

extraction_model.description: Model identifier used for extraction. Must match ^(claude|gpt)-.

processing_time_ms.description: Wall-clock extraction time in milliseconds. Must be positive.

token_count.description: Token usage object with integer fields input and output.
